description: Five quick-demo examples that mirror TC001–TC005 exactly. member_id, claim_category, treatment_date, claimed_amount, and documents all match test_cases.json. Documents reference generated files in data/test_case_missing_artifacts/.

examples.label: TC001 — Wrong Document Uploaded
examples.description: EMP001 Rajesh Kumar submits two prescriptions for a consultation claim. No hospital bill provided. System must detect wrong document type, not just reject generically.

expected.summary: Wrong doc type — no hospital bill
system_must: Stop before making any claim decision
Tell the member specifically what document type was uploaded and what is needed instead
Not return a generic error — the message must name the uploaded document type and the required document type

examples.label: TC002 — Unreadable Document
examples.description: EMP004 Sneha Reddy submits a valid prescription but a blurry, unreadable pharmacy bill. System must ask for re-upload of that specific doc, not reject the claim outright.

system_must: Identify that the pharmacy bill cannot be read
Ask the member to re-upload that specific document

examples.label: TC003 — Patient Name Mismatch
examples.description: EMP001 Rajesh Kumar submits a prescription for Rajesh but a hospital bill for Arjun Mehta. System must detect the name mismatch and surface both names, not proceed to a decision.

system_must: Detect that the documents belong to different people
Surface this to the member with the specific names found on each document
Not proceed to a claim decision

examples.label: TC004 — Clean Consultation (Full Approval)
examples.description: EMP001 Rajesh Kumar, valid OPD consultation at City Clinic. Dr. Arun Sharma, Viral Fever, ₹1500. Expect APPROVED with 10% co-pay deducted (₹1350 approved).

expected.notes: 10% co-pay applied on consultation category (₹150 deducted)

examples.label: TC005 — Waiting Period (Diabetes)
examples.description: EMP005 Vikram Joshi joined 2024-09-01. Claims for Type 2 Diabetes on 2024-10-15 — within 90-day waiting period. Expect REJECTED with eligibility date stated.

system_must: State the date from which the member will be eligible for diabetes-related claims
